info.name: Class Map Admin – Full API
info.description: Auto-rebuilt from all docs under classmap-admin/docs/. Covers: Auth, Dashboard, Schools (List, Detail, Analytics, Daily Attendance, Classes, Plans, Infrastructure, Gallery, Daily Logs, Teachers), Notifications.
